s: Unlock the full potential of music: Stream effortlessly with one app!
d: Musify is an app for streaming music. Its features include: * Online song search with suggestions * Offline listening support * Import & export your data and never lose it * Add custom playlists with link * Optimized sound experience * SponsorBlock support * Built-in equalizer with presets * Lyrics support * No ads * No subscriptions * 21 supported languages * Material UI & accent colors & dynamic colors (Android 12+)
